text.tspan: Zoom into the boundary of the
Mandelbrot set and you will find
miniature copies of the whole set,
each surrounded by its own filigree.
This self-similarity continues to
infinite depth — no two zooms alike.

text.font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
text.tspan: Every point c in the complex plane
defines a unique Julia set. Points
inside the Mandelbrot set produce
connected Julia sets; points outside
yield disconnected ‘dust’. The
Mandelbrot set is their catalogue.

text.font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
text.tspan: Each point is coloured by how many
iterations it takes for |z| to
exceed 2. Points that never escape
are in the set (shown dark). The
smooth colour gradient reveals the
fractal boundary in vivid detail.

text.font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
text.tspan: The Mandelbrot set is defined by
iterating a single recurrence:

text.font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
text.tspan: z₀ = 0, c ∈ ℂ
In set if |z| stays ≤ 2 forever

text.font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
text.tspan: The horizontal axis represents the
real part of c, and the vertical axis
the imaginary part. Each pixel is a
complex number c = a + bi. The set
lives in a region roughly from
−2.5 to 1 on the real axis and
−1.1 to 1.1 on the imaginary axis,
centred slightly left of the origin.

text.font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'
text.tspan: The large heart-shaped body is the
main cardioid, where c produces a
single attracting fixed point. The
circular bulb to its left is the
period-2 region. Between the bulbs
lie intricate structures nicknamed
‘Seahorse Valley’ and ‘Elephant
Valley’, rich with spiral filaments.

text.font-family: 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'

svg.text: Discovered by Benoît Mandelbrot in 1980, this set reveals nature’s hidden geometry.
